name: Frontend internationalization foundation
description: Add frontend internationalization plumbing so the web app resolves all UI labels through a Vietnamese locale catalog with a hard fallback to `vi`, ready for future locale expansion without changing feature screens again.
evidence: ./init.sh, pnpm --filter web lint, pnpm --filter web typecheck, pnpm --filter web test, pnpm --filter web build; added render-level fallback coverage in apps/web/src/lib/i18n/browser-fallback.test.tsx and storage-blocked changeLanguage coverage in apps/web/src/lib/i18n/change-language.test.tsx
